node.text: Joanna is working on a script called 'Finding Home' with her writing group, which she finds rewarding and emotional.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Joanna's advice for someone pursuing writing includes reading lots, trying different genres, building a solid understanding of literature, and not being afraid to write and share.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Joanna has a lot of books that she uses for writing inspiration.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna has completed her second script and is experiencing a mix of excitement and anxiety about its future.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna recently joined a writers group that she finds inspirational and supportive.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna has done research and networking non-stop for her script and is determined to make it happen.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna auditioned for a writing gig and had mixed emotions about it - excited but also anxious.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: In inspiring places like the trails, Joanna feels like writing a drama.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 7 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna's first passion was acting, but now she feels she shines in writing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Joanna discussed her script and vision with producers and they liked the elements of self-discovery in it.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "do while writing") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.97)
